column1: # The Seeed XIAO ESP32-C5 has 4 MB of flash. The default ESP-IDF single-app
# table caps the app partition at 1 MB
# already fills to 89%. Stages 5 (BLE) and 6 (802.15.4) will overflow it.
# We bump the factory partition to 3 MB so all four upcoming radios fit

column2: and we keep ~500 KB of unallocated tail for

column1: # a future SPIFFS / NVS-data partition if we ever need on-device storage.
